channel.title: BudgetRigLab
channel.description: BudgetRigLab reviews budget gaming mice, keyboards, headsets, monitors and controllers. Honest picks, real tradeoffs, no $200 'budget' nonsense.

item.title: FIFINE K669B vs HyperX SoloCast - The $40 USB Mic Showdown
item.description: FIFINE K669B vs HyperX SoloCast compared on sound, noise pickup, mute controls and boom-arm mounting. One is cheaper, one is smarter - here's who each is for.

item.title: Best Budget Gaming Mice Under $30 in 2026 (Tested Picks, No Junk)
item.description: The five best gaming mice under $30 right now - Logitech G203, HyperX Pulsefire Haste, Redragon M711 and more, with honest downsides for each.

item.title: How to Choose a Gaming Mouse for Your Grip Type (Palm, Claw, Fingertip)
item.description: Your grip style and hand size matter more than DPI. Learn how to identify your grip, measure your hand, and match it to the right budget gaming mouse shape.

item.title: Best Budget Mechanical Keyboards Under $50 (2026 Buying Guide)
item.description: Five genuinely good mechanical keyboards under $50 - Redragon K552, Royal Kludge RK61, Keychron C3 Pro and more, with switch advice and honest flaws.

item.title: Best Budget Gaming Headsets Under $60 in 2026 (Comfort-First Picks)
item.description: The best gaming headsets under $60 - HyperX Cloud Stinger 2, Razer Kraken X, Corsair HS55 and more, ranked by comfort, mic quality and honest sound.

item.title: Best Budget Gaming Monitors Under $150 (2026) - 144Hz or Bust
item.description: The best gaming monitors under $150 - AOC 24G2, KOORUI 24E4, Sceptre and more. Why refresh rate beats resolution at this budget, and what to avoid.

item.title: Best Budget PC Controllers Under $40 (2026) - Hall Effect Changed Everything
item.description: The best budget controllers for PC under $40 - GameSir T4 Kaleid, 8BitDo Ultimate C, PowerA and more. Why Hall effect sticks make cheap controllers outlast a DualSense.

item.title: Logitech G203 vs Razer DeathAdder Essential - Which $25 Mouse Should You Buy?
item.description: G203 Lightsync vs DeathAdder Essential compared - shape, sensor, clicks, software and durability. The answer depends entirely on your hand size and grip.

item.title: Redragon K552 vs Royal Kludge RK61 - Budget Keyboard Heavyweights Compared
item.description: K552 vs RK61 head-to-head - layout, switches, wireless, hot-swap and build. Two very different answers to the same $40 question.

item.title: HyperX Cloud Stinger 2 vs Razer Kraken X - The $40 Headset Duel
item.description: Cloud Stinger 2 vs Kraken X compared on comfort, mic, sound and durability. One wins on sound and mic, the other on weight and glasses comfort.

item.title: How to Build a Complete Budget Gaming Setup Under $300 (Peripherals + Desk, 2026)
item.description: A complete gaming battlestation - monitor, mouse, keyboard, headset, pad and lighting - for under $300, with three build tiers and the exact order to buy in.

item.title: How to Choose a Budget Gaming Monitor - Refresh Rate, Panels and Marketing Traps
item.description: A plain-English guide to buying a budget gaming monitor - what refresh rate, response time, panel type and FreeSync actually mean, and which specs are marketing noise.
